name: Meatballs
recipeIngredient: onion and garlic powder -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, breadcrumbs, egg, seasonings (Parmesan cheese, parsley, oregano, onion, garlic powder), and milk together until well combined.
2. Form the mixture into small meatballs.
3. Place the meatballs in a shallow baking pan.
4. Bake for 40 minutes at 350°F.
5. In a crockpot, mix ketchup and beer.
6. Add the cooked meatballs to the sauce and simmer for several hours.
7. Baking the meatballs first helps remove excess grease.
